response.overview: Hapax, a word/concept that appears only once, represents the birth of a child. The emotions and metaphors are depicted illustratively, supported by music, sound, and poetry. Moments of disconnection and misunderstanding arise. Desires that remain unfulfilled, simply because people experience the world differently. It's about how you come to know yourself as an individual. As the child grows, they gradually lose themselves. This results in a search for identity and their own place in the world—a world that is often not so easy to understand.
response.title: Hapax
